name: Hiver
description: Hiver — Gmail-based shared inbox and customer support tool for teams managing help and support emails.

seo.title: Hiver — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Hiver: Hiver — Gmail-based shared inbox and customer support tool for teams managing help and support emails.

when_to_use: Gmail-based shared inbox for a small customer support team
Collaborative email triage without leaving Google Workspace
SLA tracking and assignment for support emails in Gmail
Delegated mailbox management for finance or ops email queues
Customer support analytics on top of Gmail shared inboxes

pros: Lives inside Gmail, zero learning curve
Shared inbox without leaving your mailbox
cons: Not ideal past mid-size support teams
review.verdict: A pragmatic shared inbox for Gmail-first teams that refuse to migrate to Zendesk.
review.best_for: Small and midsize teams on Google Workspace wanting shared email without a full helpdesk.
review.not_for: Growing support orgs needing omnichannel, deep automation, or non-Google setups.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Per-seat plan; no explicit annual non-reducible commit evidence.
